jobTitle: Technical Product Support Specialist II - job post
subject: Candidacy Update: Technical Support Specialist II
body:
Hi Michael,

Thank you for submitting your tailored resume for the Technical Product Support Specialist II opening. We noticed your robust hands-on virtualized enterprise lab project and found your remote SLA and customer handling skills highly applicable to this position.

Could you please let us know your availability for a brief 15-minute phone screening with our support team lead this coming Thursday or Friday?

Best regards,
Eleanor Vance
CSO Talent Acquisition Team
Zoll Medical Corporation

subject: Application Confirmed: IT Support Specialist (Remote)
body:
Hi Michael Burson,

This automatic notification is to confirm that we have successfully received your tailored application for the IT Support Specialist role.

Our service division is currently routing applications for manual review. We will contact you directly if there is an alignment with our Meraki networking and SCCM operational workflows.

Kind regards,
Recruitment Desk
Mercer Bucks Technology
